selection: average HTP impact of the city, canton, workplaces and insurance of Zurich

words.name: Zurich
words.description: the largest city of Switzerland and the capital of its canton

words.name: city
words.description: a large permanent human settlement

words.name: canton
words.description: a member state of the Swiss federation

words.name: workplace
words.description: a location that hosts jobs

words.name: Zurich Insurance
words.description: Zurich Insurance Group, a global multi-line insurer headquartered in Zurich

words.name: entity
words.description: an organisation or administrative body that can influence people

words.name: inhabitant
words.description: a person who lives in a place

words.name: customer
words.description: a person served by a commercial entity

words.name: person
words.description: an individual human being

words.name: employed
words.description: holding a job

words.name: influenced
words.description: affected by an entity

words.name: happy
words.description: feeling or showing pleasure or contentment

words.name: time
words.description: the indefinite continued progress of existence

words.name: point
words.description: a single unit on a scale

words.name: impact
words.description: a marked effect or influence

words.name: factor
words.description: a circumstance that contributes to a result

words.name: HTP
words.description: the acronym used for the happy time point measure

words.name: weighted
words.description: scaled by a relative weight

words.name: reach
words.description: the number of people exposed to or affected by something

words.name: average
words.description: the mean value of a set of numbers

triples.name: city of Zurich
triples.description: the municipality of Zurich, the largest city of Switzerland

triples.name: canton of Zurich
triples.description: the most populous canton of Switzerland

triples.name: city of Zurich workplaces
triples.description: the city of Zurich seen as an employer location, hosting the jobs within the municipality including commuters

triples.name: employed person
triples.description: a person holding a job located in the place, residents and commuters alike

triples.name: person influenced
triples.description: the number of people an entity influences, inhabitants for a region, customers for a company or employed persons for a workplace

triples.name: time point
triples.description: a value multiplied by the time

triples.name: happy time point
triples.description: HTP, the UN DALY index extended to the lowest two levels of the Maslow pyramid

triples.name: impact factor
triples.description: a factor expressing the strength of an impact
the share of one person's happy time points that the entity influences

triples.name: weighted reach
triples.description: a reach scaled by a relative weight

triples.name: impact weighted reach
triples.description: persons influenced multiplied by the impact factor on HTP, expressed in HTP-units

triples.name: average impact weighted reach
triples.description: the mean impact weighted reach across the listed entities

formulas.name: impact weighted reach calculation
formulas.description: multiply the number of persons influenced by the impact factor on the happy time points
formulas.expression: "impact weighted reach" = "person influenced" * "impact factor on HTP"

formulas.name: average impact weighted reach calculation
formulas.description: mean of the impact weighted reach across the four Zurich entities
formulas.expression: "average impact weighted reach" = sum( "impact weighted reach" ) / count( "entity" )
